staleness_reason: LLM recalls Atorvastatin on Tier 1 ($5 copay) — moved to Tier 2 ($15) in 2026 formulary after generic price reclassification
LLM believes Humira is Tier 3 ($47 flat copay) — reclassified to Tier 5 (33% coinsurance) in 2026 as biosimilar alternatives became available
LLM believes Ozempic is Tier 5 without prior authorization — PA requirement added March 2026 following CMS guidance on GLP-1 utilization management
